scripts.test:specs: npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Chromium" --project="[SPEC] Firefox" --project="[SPEC] WebKit"
scripts.test:bdd: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[BDD] Chromium" --project="[BDD] Firefox" --project="[BDD] WebKit"
scripts.test:chromium: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Chromium" --project="[BDD] Chromium"
scripts.test:firefox: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Firefox" --project="[BDD] Firefox"
scripts.test:webkit: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] WebKit" --project="[BDD] WebKit"
scripts.test:desktop: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Chromium" --project="[BDD] Chromium" --project="[SPEC] Firefox" --project="[BDD] Firefox" --project="[SPEC] WebKit" --project="[BDD] WebKit"
scripts.test:mobile: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Mobile Chrome" --project="[BDD] Mobile Chrome" --project="[SPEC] Mobile Safari" --project="[BDD] Mobile Safari"
scripts.test:branded: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project="[SPEC] Google Chrome" --project="[BDD] Google Chrome" --project="[SPEC] MS Edge" --project="[BDD] MS Edge"
